posts.author: Wolfi (Wolfgang)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

I’m quite new to the Monday world so I hope my question can be solved easily. In my company we will be using Monday in the future. We have created corresponding boards that will be used as templates. Simple, as the processes are almost identical.

But now I have the problem that I can create automations as templates, but I can’t put together a package with a number of automations. But that would be very practical, as it would save my colleagues a lot of clicks.

Is there such a function to bundle a whole group of automations in a template?
